bareCheck.ok: ok
bareCheck.bad: err=ping-failed
checkErr.ok: ok
checkErr.bad: err=replaced
checkErrF.ok: ok
checkErrF.bad: err=wrapped: ping-failed
checkWrap.ok: ok
checkWrap.bad: err=closing: ping-failed
checkWrapf.ok: ok
checkWrapf.bad: err=closing 7: ping-failed
checkCatchSuppress.ok: ok
checkCatchSuppress.bad: ok
checkCatchBubble.ok: ok
checkCatchBubble.bad: err=caught: ping-failed
checkInValueFn.ok: ok=42
checkInValueFn.bad: err=ping-failed
